headline: Is PG&E (PCG) Pricing Look Stretching After Recent 30 Day Share Price Jump
summary: If you are wondering whether PG&E's current share price actually lines up with its underlying value, this article is going to walk through the key numbers that matter. PG&E shares last closed at US$18.13, with a 4.0% decline over the past 7 days, an 18.2% return over 30 days, 11.4% year to date, 13.7% over 1 year and 13.6% over 3 years, while the 5 year return sits at 60.2%. Recent attention on PG&E has kept the stock in focus for investors assessing how sentiment around the business and its...
